---
name: Bug report
about: Report an incorrect behavior or regression
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe what went wrong.

## Reproduction

Include the command, input JSON, and relevant choices needed to reproduce the
problem. Do not attach private or sensitive character data.

```console
pc-wizard ...
```

## Expected behavior

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual behavior

What happened instead? Include the complete error message or a focused excerpt.

## Environment

- pc-wizard version or commit:
- Operating system and architecture:
- Rust version, if running a source build:
- Official character-sheet template version or download source, if PDF-related:

## Additional context

For rules questions, cite the relevant section of the supplied SRD PDF. For PDF
issues, include the affected page and printed field label.
